summary: Added cross-browser SVG filter graceful degradation: global.css with @supports fallbacks (box-shadow, text-shadow, mix-blend-mode) and a .no-svg-filters body class applied by SVGFilters.jsx JS detection. Added print styles to global.css. Created 13-test browser-compatibility.test.js covering SVG filter detection, CSS variable support, Flexbox/Grid detection, and fallback activation. Added vitest+jsdom to devDependencies. Created DEPLOYMENT.md documenting environment variables, Vercel config, and email service setup. All tests pass, production build succeeds.
